---
title: "NHANES Health Indicators — Hypothesis Testing"
author: "T.V.Q (James)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    css: style.css
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 9,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 150
)
```
